Student Login & Class Code

Students enter their nickname and class code so teachers can track their own class results.

Student Entry

No student info saved yet.

For Teachers

Recommended setup:
1. Teacher writes a class code on the board, like P6A2026.
2. Students enter their nickname and class code before taking the quiz.
3. Scores are saved under that class code, so each teacher can view only their own class leaderboard.

Suggested Class Codes

Primary 6A
P6A2026
Secondary 1B
S1B2026
Reading Club
READINGCLUB

Class Leaderboard & Teacher Dashboard

Class results are organized by class code, so teachers can track their own students clearly.

View a Class

Students must enter a nickname and class code before the quiz. Scores are saved locally and, when Firebase is connected, under classScores / class code.
